question: What is the principal place of business of the partnership?
answer_paragraph: This Partnership Agreement ('Agreement') is made and entered into on February 10, 2023 ('Effective Date'), by and between Jackson Smith ('Partner A') and Emily Lee ('Partner B'), collectively referred to as ('Partners'). The principal place of business of the partnership shall be 123 Main Street, New York, NY 10001.
